revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:citation/CS1/sandbox|citation
|CitationClass=book
|SandboxPath=/sandbox
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=

The '''Template:Cite_book/new''' uses the [[Lua script]] interface with [[Module:Citation/CS1/sandbox]] to format book cites using the [[wp:CS1|Citation Style 1]] for cite parameters.
}}

[[Category:Lua-based templates]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:citation/CS1/sandbox|citation |CitationClass=book |SandboxPath=/sandbox }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|content=
The '''Template:Cite_book/new''' uses the [[Lua script]] interface with [[Module:Citation/CS1/sandbox]] to format book cites using the [[wp:CS1|Citation Style 1]] for cite parameters. }}
[[Category:Lua-based templates]]
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:citation/CS1/sandbox|citation |CitationClass=book |SandboxPath=/sandbox }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|content=

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_book%2Fnew here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_book%2Fnew for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#invoke:citation/CS1/sandbox|citation |CitationClass=book |SandboxPath=/sandbox }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|content=
The '''Template:Cite_book/new''' uses the [[Lua script]] interface with [[Module:Citation/CS1/sandbox]] to format book cites using the [[wp:CS1|Citation Style 1]] for cite parameters. }}
[[Category:Lua-based templates]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
